name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BUG-60
title: dispatcher does not validate --linked-item path layout; wrong path silently produces wrong --feature
description: Wave 4 dispatch experience: caller passed --linked-item .rabbit/items/RABBIT-FEATURE-BACKLOG-8 and the assembled prompt derived --feature='.rabbit' from the penultimate-two path segments. dispatch-tdd-subagent.py gave no validation error; the wrong --feature would have surfaced only when the subagent ran item-status.py downstream. Fix candidate: validate at dispatch time that --linked-item's penultimate-two segments form a 'features/<feature>' pair (matching the rabbit-file storage layout 'rabbit/features/<feature>/<type>s/<id>/'). Reject with a clear error message otherwise. Discovered by Wave 4 (rabbit-feature consolidation re-audit, 2026-05-23). Owning audit wave: tdd-subagent (Wave 3 done; this is a regression-test gap rather than a new bug, so a tiny fix wave or rolled into Plan E.tdd-subagent migration).
